response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist engineer with 16+ years of experience and genuine staff-level credentials, but he falls significantly short of the core requirements for this role. The position demands 8+ years of AI-driven solution delivery; his AI-specific work (MCP generators, agentic workflows) appears only in his current role, which started in April 2025. Python — explicitly required — is absent from his skills entirely. Critical technical areas such as vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, and cloud AI system design are not demonstrated anywhere in the resume. His engineering fundamentals are solid, but this is not the right profile for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI Engineer.
strengths: Active involvement with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role, directly aligned with the job's cutting-edge tooling
Long track record at staff-level seniority across multiple companies, with demonstrated leadership through workshops, talks, and technical mentorship
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise backed by production-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby, millions of mailings at Optilyz)
concerns: Python is completely absent from his listed skills and work history, despite being a primary required language for the role
No evidence of vector database usage, RAG architecture design, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines — all core technical requirements
AI/GenAI experience is limited to roughly 1–2 months in his current role; the resume does not demonstrate the 8+ years of production AI solution delivery the position requires
